about.title: About NRV Enterprises
about.description: With over 3 years of experience, NRV Enterprises is a trusted name in lubricants and machine-related products. We serve businesses and individuals with quality, reliability, and competitive pricing.

expertise.desc: 3+ years of hands-on experience in lubricants and industrial solutions.

delivery.title: Reliable Delivery
delivery.desc: On-time delivery, every time. We value your business schedule.

hero.title: About NRV Enterprises
hero.subtitle: Built on trust, driven by quality.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: NRV Enterprises was founded with a simple goal — to make quality lubricants and industrial products accessible to businesses of all sizes. What started as a small trading operation has grown into a trusted name in the region.
story.p2: We work closely with our clients to understand their needs and recommend the right products for their machinery, vehicles, and industrial operations.
story.p3: Our commitment to quality, honest pricing, and reliable service has earned us the trust of hundreds of clients across the region.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To be the most trusted supplier of lubricants and industrial products — delivering quality, reliability, and expert guidance to every client.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: To expand our reach across India while maintaining the personal touch and quality standards that define NRV Enterprises.
